name: Peanut Butter Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Sesame oil (can substitute olive oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook linguine according to package instructions in boiling water; drain.
2. In a large bowl, mix all the remaining ingredients together.
3. Add linguine to the sauce and toss to coat well.
4. Refrigerate. Good for packing in kid's lunches.
